# Projections of Future Incidence

Thibaut Jombart 2026-03-20

[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/reconhub/projections2/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/reconhub/projections2/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![Codecov test
coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/reconhub/projections2/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/reconhub/projections2)

## Getting started

To install the package, use:

``` r
pak::pak("reconhub/projections2")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`build_projections()`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/build_projections.md)
  : Constructor for projections objects
- [`as.matrix(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/conversions.md)
  [`as.data.frame(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/conversions.md)
  : Conversion of projections objects
- [`cumulate(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/cumulate.projections.md)
  : Compute cumulative projections
- [`merge_add_projections()`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/merge_add_projections.md)
  [`` `+`( ``*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/merge_add_projections.md)
  : Add data of different projections objects
- [`merge_projections()`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/merge_projections.md)
  : Merge a list of projections objects
- [`plot(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/plot.projections.md)
  [`add_projections()`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/plot.projections.md)
  : Plot projections objects
- [`print(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/print.projections.md)
  : Print method for projections objects
- [`project()`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/project.md)
  : Project future incidence
- [`get_dates(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/projections_accessors.md)
  : Access content projections objects
- [`` `[`( ``*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/subset.md)
  [`subset(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/subset.md)
  : Subsetting 'projections' objects
- [`summary(`*`<projections>`*`)`](http://www.repidemicsconsortium.org/projections2/reference/summary.projections.md)
  : Summary for projections objects
